jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Voylla - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
